intro.caption: Design and technology turning ideas into high-impact digital experiences.

about: I am Sarhang Salah, a creative and detail-oriented professional working across motion graphics, graphic design, branding, UI/UX, website development, video editing, digital content production and social-media management.

I can build a complete brand identity from the first logo and color system through packaging, social-media assets, video advertising, motion graphics, catalogues, brochures, websites and digital-marketing campaigns. My objective is to create a distinctive, modern and effective identity that builds customer trust and increases audience engagement.
personal: Iraq — available for remote and collaborative work

services.title: Motion Graphics & Video
services.summary: Animated content and commercial video production for brands and social channels.
bullets: Motion graphics for advertising, brands and conversion campaigns
Logo animation, intro/outro sequences and motion typography
Promotional videos, commercial ads, Reels, Shorts and short-form content
Video editing, montage, color correction/grading and VFX/GFX/SFX/CGI
YouTube thumbnails and video-content cover design

services.title: Graphic Design & Branding
services.summary: From a brand idea to a unified and complete visual system.
bullets: Logo design, brand identity, color systems and typography direction
Business cards, office materials, receipts and commercial identity assets
Flex, banners, posters, print advertising and digital advertising
Brochures, catalogues, books, booklets, packaging and label design
Product mockups, social posts and promotional campaign layout

services.title: Social Media & Digital Marketing
services.summary: Planning, producing and managing content for measurable brand growth.
bullets: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube page management
Content strategy, content calendars, post and story production
Advertising campaigns, ads management and sponsored-content setup
Brand awareness, audience engagement and marketing-campaign execution
Performance analysis and optimization recommendations

services.title: Web Design & UI/UX
services.summary: Fast, responsive and modern websites with clear user journeys.
bullets: Landing pages, portfolio websites and commercial websites
UI/UX design and user-flow organization
Responsive web design for mobile, tablet and desktop
WordPress and HTML/CSS/JavaScript/React/Python workflows
Domains, hosting, deployment, Cloudflare, Supabase and Firebase

experience.title: K Door Company
experience.desc: Produced motion graphics, commercial advertising design, social-media content and campaign assets, promotional video, and modern sales content for a company specializing in doors and residential products.

experience.title: Dar Najran
experience.desc: Delivered graphic design, digital advertising, sales-campaign design, banners and flex materials, visual identity and product-content production for a stationery and school-supplies business.

experience.title: Honey Behesht
experience.desc: Built branding, packaging and label design, social-media content, product presentation and motion advertising for a natural honey and food brand.

experience.title: Jwankila
experience.desc: Created commercial advertising, social-media posts, visual branding, product promotion, campaigns and story content for a cosmetics and beauty brand.

experience.title: CDC Peshang / Peshang Institute
experience.desc: Developed educational advertising, managed social media, designed banners and posters, and organized institutional awareness campaigns.

experience.title: Betapik & SNew Sulaymaniyah
experience.desc: Handled graphic design, page management, agency work, digital-content production, advertising, promotion, sales posts and modern product presentation.

experience.title: Mashtal
experience.desc: Managed pages and sponsorship, created posts and sales advertising, planned content, and worked in camera operation and photography.

achievement.title: Game Pixel — 2018–2021
achievement.text: From 2018 to 2021, I created gaming videos and tutorials, designed thumbnails, edited video, managed the channel community and developed its visual identity. This experience built practical expertise in audience-focused content, channel branding and community growth.
achievement.legacyNote: The first channel reached 80K+ subscribers before it was closed because of a copyright issue.
achievement.channelAria: Open the current Game Pixel YouTube channel

facebookGroup.title: Facebook group · 60K+ members
facebookGroup.text: A dedicated Facebook community for Islamic religious posts and content.

projects.title: Motion, Video & Commercial Production
projects.desc: Motion graphics, promotional video, commercial ads, Reels, Shorts, logo animation, intro/outro, VFX and editing.

projects.title: Graphic Design & Brand Identity
projects.desc: Logos, brand identities, packaging, labels, mockups, business cards, brochures, catalogues, books, booklets, flex and banners.

projects.title: Social Media & Campaigns
projects.desc: Social-media posts, Instagram Stories, Facebook Ads, TikTok content, content strategy, promotional campaigns and audience engagement.

projects.title: Websites, Landing Pages & UI/UX
projects.desc: Websites, landing pages, portfolios, UI/UX, WordPress, HTML/CSS/JavaScript, responsive design, hosting and deployment.

projects.title: 3D & AI Visual Production
projects.desc: 3D product scenes, 3D text animation, product mockups, AI-generated images and video, AI photography and creative prompt workflows.

brandsText: A selected set of brands, agencies and organizations I have supported through design, content, campaigns or digital production.
strengths: Able to work effectively under pressure and within short deadlines.
Comfortable working independently and as part of a team.
Fast learner who adapts quickly to new technologies.
Professional communication and client relationship skills.
Able to turn a simple idea into an effective visual scene.
Presents projects in a formal, modern and organized manner.

entries: Continuous learning in technology, design, coding, editing and AI through the delivery of real projects for brands and companies.

contact.title: Ready to turn your idea into a clear, high-impact result.
contact.text: Available for private projects, brand identity, websites, advertising campaigns, social media, motion graphics, and digital work that needs creative thinking and close attention to detail.

portfolio.intro: Selected contributions are presented as a clear work index. Client names are shown without using unpublished campaign visuals, source files or confidential commercial material.
portfolio.noteText: Detailed visual samples, campaign files and additional work can be shared during a project discussion when client permission and confidentiality allow.
